nasb.text: Whenever you stand praying, forgive, if you have anything against anyone, so that your Father who is in heaven will also forgive you your transgressions.

esv.text: And whenever you stand praying, forgive, if you have anything against anyone, so that your Father also who is in heaven may forgive you your trespasses.”

cnv.text: 你們站著禱告的時候，如果有誰得罪了你們，就該饒恕他，好使你們的天父也饒恕你們的過犯。”

ccb.text: 你们站着祷告的时候，若想起有人得罪了你们，就要饶恕他。这样，你们天上的父也会饶恕你们的过犯。

csbs.text: 当你们站着祷告的时候，如果向什么人怀怨，就要饶恕他。这样，你们在天上的父也会饶恕你们的过犯。
